subject: Booking request - consultation
body:
Hi,

My name is Client X. I'd like to book a consultation next Tuesday at 10am at 12 Sample Street, Example Town.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Kind regards,
Client X

subject: Installation booking
body:
Hello,

This is Client Y. Could you fit us in for an installation next Wednesday at 1pm? The address is 7 Demo Road, Sampletown.

Many thanks,
Client Y

subject: Maintenance visit
body:
Hi team,

We'd like to arrange a maintenance visit next Thursday at 2:30pm.
Site: Unit 4, Example Industrial Estate

Regards,
Operations, Company A

subject: Question about surveys
body:
Hi,

Do you carry out surveys? We may need one at some point and wanted to check what you offer first.

Thanks,
Client Z

subject: Evening consultation?
body:
Hello,

I'm Client W - could I get a consultation next Friday at 7pm? Daytime is tricky for me. I'm based at 9 Test Lane, Exampleville.

Thanks,
Client W

subject: Inspection needed
body:
Hi there,

This is Client V. We need an inspection tomorrow at 9am if possible.

Location: 22 Mock Avenue, Testford

Book online here: https://example.com/booking

Cheers,
Client V
